mapper.select: select r.review_no as no , r.review_star as star , r.review_comment as "comment" , r.review_created_date as createdDate , r.review_updated_date as updatedDate , u.user_id as "user.id" , r.review_open_status as openStatus , r.movie_no as "movie.no" from movmov_movie_reviews r, movmov_users u, movmov_movies m where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.user_id = r.user_id and r.movie_no = m.movie_no order by updatedDate desc

select r.review_no as no , r.review_star as star , r.review_comment as "comment" , r.review_created_date as createdDate , r.review_updated_date as updatedDate , u.user_id as "user.id" , u.user_nickname as "user.nickname" , r.movie_no as movie_no , r.review_open_status as openStatus from movmov_movie_reviews r join movmov_users u on r.user_id = u.user_id join movmov_movies m on r.movie_no = m.movie_no where r.movie_no = #{movieNo} and r.review_open_status = 'Y' order by r.review_updated_date desc

select review_no as no , review_star as star , review_comment as "comment" , review_created_date as createdDate , review_updated_date as updatedDate , review_open_status as openStatus , user_id as "user.id" , movie_no as "movie.no" from movmov_movie_reviews where movie_no = #{movieNo} and user_id = #{userId} order by review_updated_date desc
mapper.insert: insert into movmov_movie_reviews (review_no, review_star, review_comment, review_created_date, review_updated_date, user_id, movie_no, review_open_status) values (review_no_seq.nextval, #{star}, #{comment}, sysdate, sysdate, #{user.id}, #{movie.no}, #{openStatus})
